name: Kurento
description: Kurento — open-source WebRTC media server with computer vision and AR capabilities

seo.title: Kurento — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Kurento: Kurento — open-source WebRTC media server with computer vision and AR capabilities

when_to_use: WebRTC media server with AR and computer vision capabilities
Building video analytics into real-time communication pipelines
Group video conferencing with server-side media processing
Face detection and tracking in WebRTC video streams
Custom media pipeline composition with Kurento Media Pipeline API

pros: Media server with CV and AR filter pipelines
cons: Core project has seen slow maintenance periods
Most new projects pick lighter SFUs
review.verdict: Still useful for media processing pipelines, but not the default choice for new WebRTC apps in 2026.
review.best_for: Apps needing server-side media processing and filters
review.not_for: New projects that just need a lean low-latency SFU

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
